content.problemStatement:
You are given an integer nnn and mmm, representing the dimensions of an n×mn×mn×m matrix. You need to construct an n×mn×mn×m matrix such that the following properties are satisfied:


Each element in the matrix is 1.
The sum of the elements of the matrix is even.
If it is not possible then print −1-1−1.


Input Format

The first line contains one integer nnn and mmm, the size of the matrix.


Output Format

Print a 2d matrix with given properties or −1-1−1.
content.inputFormat: First line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Each test case consists of a line with two integers n and m (1 ≤ n, m ≤ 100) separated by a space, denoting the dimensions of the matrix.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, if n·m is odd print a single line containing -1. Otherwise print n lines, each containing m integers equal to 1 separated by a single space. Print a blank line between the outputs of consecutive test cases.

sampleTestCases.explanation: n·m = 4 is even, so a 2×2 matrix of 1s is printed.
n·m = 1 is odd, therefore no valid matrix exists.
n·m = 9 is odd, so the answer is -1.

solution.approach: The sum of all elements in an n×m matrix filled with 1s equals n·m. This sum is even iff n·m is even. Therefore, a valid matrix exists only when the product is even. If it is odd we output -1. When the product is even we simply output a matrix of 1s. The algorithm runs in O(n·m) per test case to generate the output, which is trivial for the given limits.
solution.timeComplexity: O(n·m) per test case (output size), O(1) extra work.
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1) auxiliary space besides the output buffer.

code.Java:
import java.io.*;import java.util.*;public class Main {public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {BufferedReader br=new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(System.in));StringBuilder out=new StringBuilder();String line=br.readLine();while(line!=null&&line.trim().isEmpty()) line=br.readLine();int T=Integer.parseInt(line.trim());for(int tc=0;tc<T;tc++){while((line=br.readLine())!=null&&line.trim().isEmpty()){}if(line==null) break;StringTokenizer st=new StringTokenizer(line);int n=Integer.parseInt(st.nextToken());int m=Integer.parseInt(st.nextToken());long total=1L*n*m;if((total&1L)==1L){out.append("-1
");}else{StringBuilder row=new StringBuilder();for(int j=0;j<m;j++){if(j>0) row.append(' ');row.append('1');}for(int i=0;i<n;i++){out.append(row).append('
');}}if(tc!=T-1) out.append('
');}System.out.print(out.toString());}}
